title: Nuclearism
description:
A Mod for Minecraft Neoforge 1.21.1 that adds brand new ores machinery and nuclear tech! 


Similar To HBM Nuclear Tech Mod but for 1.21.1 Neoforge
body:
Nuclearism is a Nuclear Tech Related Mod for Minecraft 1.21.1 With some New Features such as Oil, Oil Refineries, Steel Alloy, Alloy Furnace, Lead, Uranium, Plutonium, Chicago Pile Nuclear Reactor, Research Reactor, Isotopes, Foundry, Mechanical Bore, Nuclear Bomb and a Radiation System!



Nuclearism has plans to become a larger and better Minecraft Nuclear tech mod for 1.21.1!

GECKOLIB REQUIRED
